title: Project Metadata, Python Packaging, Entry Points, Plugins, and Clean Installs · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved build trace contains one plausible source, path, encoding, metadata, parser, renderer, template, URL, asset, accessibility, security, cache, package, deployment, or release defect; locate the first failed boundary before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in installed reproducible static-site command and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Declare build backend, project metadata, Python bounds, dependencies, optional groups, entry point, package data, license, and version source in pyproject.toml.
Expose an import-safe console script with argument parsing, status codes, stdout and stderr contracts, help, version, and module execution parity.
Load packaged templates, schemas, and default assets through supported resource APIs rather than current working directory assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Pyproject Metadata
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug publishing team handles case 2682 during an offline-first field documentation build. def evidence_ssg_clean_install_1hyt07(artifacts: int = 2, inspected: int = 2, clean_installs: int = 3, command_smokes: int = 3, unsafe_plugins: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1hyt07 = "1hyt07-70tyh1-8796"
    assert evidence_variant_1hyt07
    evidence_axes_1hyt07 = (
        "reader1hyt07",
        "source8796",
        "parse70tyh1",
        "route1hyt078796",
        "artifact87961hyt07",
        "recovery70tyh18796",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1hyt07)) == 6
    if artifacts != 2 or inspected < 0:
        return False, inspected, "artifact-shape"
    if inspected != artifacts:
        return False, inspected, "artifact-inspection"
    if clean_installs < 2 or command_smokes != clean_installs:
        return False, command_smokes, "clean-install"
    if unsafe_plugins > 0:
        return False, unsafe_plugins, "plugin-boundary"
    assert inspected == artifacts
    return True, command_smokes, "installed-generator"
